productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Women Brillo White Cap
description: Created using 96% cotton and 4% elastane, this cap from adidas is a perfect blend of comfort and style. Crown made of a cotton/elastane blend fabric with embroidered eyelets to offer breathable comfort to the head Curved visor with stitch detailing for enhanced durability Brand logo with metallic embelishments on the front Fabric covered button on the top of the cap for style Inner rim with elastane for a customised Fit Cap care Hand wash in cold water Do not tumble dry or dry clean
